description: Create a new playlist named 'Epic Rock' in the Chinook database ('chinook.odb'). Populate the playlist with all tracks that are in the 'Rock' genre, have a duration greater than 300,000 milliseconds, and have a non-empty composer field. Ensure the new playlist is assigned a unique PlaylistId and all associations are correctly recorded in the 'Playlist' and 'PlaylistTrack' tables.
